allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('loaded:', d.get\('loaded'\), 'tasks:', len\(d.get\('tasks',[]\)\) if d.get\('loaded'\) else 0\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('stats total:', d['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['id'], d['score'], d['priority']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('pth web works:', d['total'], 'tasks'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tasks:', len\(d.get\('tasks',[]\)\), 'error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('error:', d.get\('error','none'\), 'tasks:', len\(d.get\('tasks',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['total']\); [print\(t.get\('assignedPod',''\)\) for t in d['tasks']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d['total']\); [print\(t['id'], t['priority']\) for t in d['tasks']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('empty pod filter total:', d['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TODO in backlog:', d['total']\); [print\(t['id'], t['status']\) for t in d['tasks']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Prioritized:', d['total']\); [print\(t['id'], t['score']\) for t in d['tasks']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=list\(d.items\(\)\)[:3]; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in items]")
